title: Refined Storage - EMI Integration
description: Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for EMI, enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.
body:
Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for EMI, enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.

## Recipe transferring in the Crafting Grid

You can transfer recipes from EMI directly into the [Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/crafting-grid.html).

- Missing ingredients? The transfer will still place what you have.  
- If autocrafting is available for missing ingredients, you can start autocrafting tasks from the preview.

![EMI crafting grid transfer](https://refinedmods.com/emi-crafting-grid-transfer.16d8b455.png)  
![EMI crafting grid transfer preview](https://refinedmods.com/emi-crafting-grid-transfer-preview.e2dcfb12.png)

## Recipe transferring in the Pattern Grid

Recipes from EMI can also be transferred into the [Pattern Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/autocrafting/pattern-grid.html). The interface will show which ingredients are autocraftable.

## R/U key support

You can use the R and U keys on the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html) and filter slots to view recipes and usages respectively.

## Recipe viewer synchronization

You can sync the search box between EMI and the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html):

- One-way (Grid → EMI)  
- Two-way sync

![EMI sync in the Grid](https://refinedmods.com/emi-sync.dcb08734.png)

## Ghost ingredient dragging

You can drag any type of ingredient from EMI to filter slots in Refined Storage.

![EMI ghost ingredient dragging](https://refinedmods.com/emi-ghost-dragging.22ebc88e.png)

## Exclusion zones

EMI elements automatically reposition to avoid overlapping Refined Storage GUI components.
